arts.ttl: Rodrygo and Vinícius double up as Real Madrid hit five past hapless Salzburg
arts.sum: “We will play and then we will see,” Carlo Ancelotti had said, so Real Madrid did their part and by the end of an ultimately easy night, life looked good again. The European champions started this match as the 22nd best team in the continent, somewhere towards the bottom of a table that keeps everyone guessing and supposedly on the edge of a catastrophe, and finished it eight places higher and feeling like favourites again. Madrid had been defeated by Lille, Milan and Liverpool, but there was time still and a revival to come and now a 5-1 victory over Red Bull Salzburg in their penultimate game lifts them back among the seeds for the playoff round. With one game to go, against Brest next week, it also leaves them a single point from not having to play it at all. Two goals each from Rodrygo and Vinícius and another for Kylian Mbappé means they still have a small chance of completing the first phase of this new format in the top eight. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Vinícius Júnior reaches 100 goals with Real Madrid as club advances in Champions League
arts.sum: Vinícius scored his 99th and 100th goals, according to UEFA, moving him into third place in the top Brazilian scorers in the Champions League with 28 goals in the competition. Rodrygo has scored five goals in his last four matches, while Vinícius has three in his last two games.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 5-1 Red Bull Salzburg: Highlights, man of the match, stats as five-star Los Blancos run riot
arts.sum: Real Madrid move into 16th spot in the Champions League table and secure a playoff spot courtesy of a 5-1 victory over Red Bull Salzburg in their penultimate match in the league phase of the competition.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr’s Real Madrid ban extended amid Saudi interest
arts.sum: This card marks his third in the Champions League, meaning he will miss the final group stage match against Brest. Consequently, he will miss the next two games: Real Valladolid in LaLiga and Brest in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: Bellingham's 'brilliant' backheel assist sets up Rodrygo second
arts.sum: Rodrygo scores his second goal of the night to put Real Madrid 2-0 up against Red Bull Salzburg thanks a "brilliant" assist from Jude Bellingham.
